skills.description: Biome v2 linter/formatter reference. Auto-loads when working with biome.json, biome config, linting rules, formatting, import organization, biome check.

skills.description: Drizzle ORM v0.45+ reference for PostgreSQL. Auto-loads when working with drizzle-orm, pgTable, schema definitions, drizzle queries, migrations, drizzle-kit.

skills.name: zustand-v5

skills.name: tanstack-table-v8
skills.description: TanStack Table v8 headless table reference. Auto-loads when working with useReactTable, createColumnHelper, ColumnDef, flexRender, sorting, filtering, pagination.

skills.name: citty
skills.description: Reference for the citty CLI framework (UnJS). Use this skill whenever writing CLI commands, defining arguments/options, creating subcommands, or working with any file in packages/cli/. This covers defineCommand, runMain, argument definitions, subcommands, lifecycle hooks, and all citty patterns used in this project.

skills.name: krometrail-mcp
skills.description: Krometrail MCP tool reference. LOAD THIS SKILL before invoking any mcp__krometrail__* tool. Covers debug_*, chrome_*, and session_* namespaces with per-language references for Python, Node.js, Go, and Chrome.

skills.name: krometrail-cli
skills.description: Krometrail CLI reference. Load when invoking the krometrail CLI binary. Covers all debug and browser subcommands, breakpoint syntax, output modes, and per-language setup references.
